title: Reign Over Me
html: Intro: A9 E/G# D9 Bm7 (2X) A9 E/G# I'm running to you, my Lord D9 Bm7 My soul yearns for you F#m C#m7 I'm poor, blind and naked Bm7 Esus4 E With nothing to offer you F#m C#m7 I surrender in your arms, oh God D9 Bm7 For I know you take me as I am F#m C#m7 I am here to buy your gold Bm7 A/C# Esus4 E Purify my heart, oh Lord F#m E D9 Reign over me A/C# I surrender to you Esus4 E F#m I surrender to you E D9 Reign over me A/C# My beloved Esus4 E I wait and I lo-ong for you Bridge: D9/F# E/G# Asus4 A9 D9/F# E/G# Solo: F#m E D9 A/C# Esus4 E F#m E D9 G Esus4 E END: D9/F# E/G# Asus4 A9 (8x)
